mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.deleted, h.created_at AS createdAt, h.modified_at AS modifiedAt, h.title, h.role, h.text, h.user_space_id AS userSpaceId, h.folder_id AS folderId, h.pdf_generated_at AS pdfGeneratedAt, h.pdf_generated_by AS pdfGeneratedBy, us.space_id AS spaceId, us.status AS userSpaceStatus, s.work_name AS workName, g.id AS groupId, g.group_name AS groupName, us.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName FROM handover h LEFT JOIN user_space us ON h.user_space_id = us.id LEFT JOIN space s ON us.space_id = s.id LEFT JOIN tb_group g ON s.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user u ON us.user_id = u.id WHERE h.id = #{id}

SELECT h.id, h.title, h.role, h.user_space_id AS userSpaceId, h.folder_id AS folderId, h.pdf_generated_at AS pdfGeneratedAt, h.pdf_generated_by AS pdfGeneratedBy, h.created_at AS createdAt, us.status AS userSpaceStatus, us.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName FROM handover h INNER JOIN user_space us ON h.user_space_id = us.id LEFT JOIN user u ON us.user_id = u.id WHERE us.space_id = #{spaceId} AND h.deleted = false AND h.folder_id IS NULL ORDER BY h.created_at DESC

SELECT h.id, h.title, h.role, h.user_space_id AS userSpaceId, h.folder_id AS folderId, h.pdf_generated_at AS pdfGeneratedAt, h.pdf_generated_by AS pdfGeneratedBy, h.created_at AS createdAt, us.status AS userSpaceStatus, us.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName FROM handover h INNER JOIN user_space us ON h.user_space_id = us.id LEFT JOIN user u ON us.user_id = u.id WHERE us.space_id = #{param1} AND h.deleted = false AND h.folder_id = #{param2} ORDER BY h.created_at DESC

SELECT h.id, h.deleted, h.created_at AS createdAt, h.modified_at AS modifiedAt, h.title, h.role, h.text, h.user_space_id AS userSpaceId, h.folder_id AS folderId, h.pdf_generated_at AS pdfGeneratedAt, h.pdf_generated_by AS pdfGeneratedBy, us.space_id AS spaceId, us.status AS userSpaceStatus, s.work_name AS workName, g.id AS groupId, g.group_name AS groupName, us.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName FROM handover h LEFT JOIN user_space us ON h.user_space_id = us.id LEFT JOIN space s ON us.space_id = s.id LEFT JOIN tb_group g ON s.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN user u ON us.user_id = u.id WHERE h.user_space_id = #{userSpaceId} AND h.deleted = false ORDER BY h.created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT h.id AS handoverId, us.space_id AS spaceId, us.user_id AS ownerUserId, us.status AS ownerUserSpaceStatus, h.pdf_generated_at AS pdfGeneratedAt, h.pdf_generated_by AS pdfGeneratedBy, ap.id AS activeApprovalId, ap.step_status AS activeApprovalStepStatus, MAX(CASE WHEN ua.approval_role = 'ASSIGNOR' THEN ua.user_id END) AS assignorId, MAX(CASE WHEN ua.approval_role = 'ASSIGNEE' THEN ua.user_id END) AS assigneeId FROM handover h LEFT JOIN user_space us ON h.user_space_id = us.id LEFT JOIN approval ap ON ap.space_id = us.space_id AND ap.deleted = false AND ap.step_status != 'COMPLETED' LEFT JOIN user_approval ua ON ua.approval_id = ap.id AND ua.deleted = false WHERE h.id = #{handoverId} AND h.deleted = false GROUP BY h.id, us.space_id, us.user_id, us.status, h.pdf_generated_at, h.pdf_generated_by, ap.id, ap.step_status ORDER BY ap.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT #{spaceId} AS spaceId, ap.id AS activeApprovalId, ap.step_status AS activeApprovalStepStatus, MAX(CASE WHEN ua.approval_role = 'ASSIGNOR' THEN ua.user_id END) AS assignorId, MAX(CASE WHEN ua.approval_role = 'ASSIGNEE' THEN ua.user_id END) AS assigneeId FROM approval ap LEFT JOIN user_approval ua ON ua.approval_id = ap.id AND ua.deleted = false WHERE ap.space_id = #{spaceId} AND ap.deleted = false AND ap.step_status != 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY ap.id, ap.step_status ORDER BY ap.id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM folder WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND name = '인수인계서' AND deleted = false ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
